headline: Oil’s $30 whipsaw just put Buffett’s biggest energy bet back on screen
summary: Occidental Petroleum (OXY) did not need company-specific news to move on March 10. It just needed oil to reverse hard. headline: Should Occidental’s US$1.20 Billion Debt Tender and Covenant Changes Require Action From OXY Investors?
summary: Occidental Petroleum recently completed a heavily subscribed cash tender offer for several series of senior notes and debentures, increasing its aggregate purchase cap from US$700,000,000 to US$1.20 billion and setting pricing off U.S. Treasury yields for early tenders settled on March 9, 2026. By pairing the enlarged tender offer with consent solicitations that removed covenants and shortened redemption notice on its 6.125% 2031 Notes, Occidental has taken a meaningful step to simplify its...

headline: How The Occidental Petroleum (OXY) Narrative Is Shifting With New Targets And 2026 Guidance
summary: Occidental Petroleum’s fair value estimate has shifted from US$48.94 to US$52.52, putting fresh focus on how price targets are evolving. That move sits alongside Street research that now clusters in the mid to high US$50s, as analysts weigh updated oil price assumptions, 2026 guidance and capital allocation signals after Q4 results. As you read on, you will see how these inputs shape the current narrative and what to watch to stay in tune with the next round of revisions. Stay updated as the...
